name: advanced-skill-builder
description: An interactive guide for creating production-ready Claude skills through structured dialogue. Whether you're building your first skill or enhancing an MCP integration, this skill walks you through requirements gathering, planning, YAML frontmatter generation, instruction writing, testing, and iterative refinement.
